name: Arief Daffa Abdullah
headline: Web Developer
summary: Web Developer specializing in building captivating and user-friendly web experiences. My primary focus is translating design concepts into seamless user interfaces. Graduated from Brawijaya University with a Bachelor's degree in Informatics (Computer Science) and currently living in Bekasi, Jawa Barat.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Working as a contract Frontend Developer at CODE.ID.

experience.title: Frontend Web Developer
experience.description: Collaborated with the other team members to transform client visions into dynamic features. Implemented a new feature using ReactJS while maintaining existing app functionality. Refactor existing code to enhance performance, removing potential bugs and improving overall system stability.

experience.company: BCC Fakultas Ilmu Komputer Universitas Brawijaya
experience.title: Member of Frontend Department
experience.description: Member of the Frontend Department at BCC (Basic Computing Community), Faculty of Computer Science, Brawijaya University.

experience.title: Software Engineer - Web Platform Intern
experience.description: Contributed as one of the Web Platform Engineer team that manages Search component in Tokopedia's web app. Performed a debugging process to help detect and remove existing or potential errors in Tokopedia's web app. Refactor, Test, and increase app performance in Tokopedia's Search component to further improve customers experience while using the app.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer Path - Generasi Gigih 2.0 By YABB & GoTo
experience.description: Participated in the Frontend Engineer Path of the Generasi Gigih 2.0 program by Yayasan Anak Bangsa Bisa and GoTo.

experience.title: Lead Frontend Developer
experience.description: Led a Frontend Developer team responsible for maintaining and improving the app. Introduce new technologies or tools that can help to improve team performance and output. Created a workflow for the Frontend Developer team to minimize room for errors and increase overall development efficiency.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Implementing design created by UI/UX team into a usable app that can accommodate 5000 users daily. Work with the API created by the Backend Developer to implement it in the app.

experience.title: Staff of Developer Department
experience.description: Staff member of the Developer Department at POROS Organization of Open Source.

experience.title: Staff of Information and Communication Center Bureau
experience.description: Staff of the Information and Communication Center Bureau at the Executive Board of Brawijaya University.

education.description: Studied computer science with focus on software engineering. Active member of Basic Computing Community (BCC), affiliated with GoTo and Gojek.
